ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bra_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bra size */,
  "band_size" TEXT /* Band size of the bra (e.g., 65, 70, 75) */,
  "cup_size" TEXT /* Cup size of the bra (e.g., B, C, D, E) */,
  "under_bust_min" INTEGER /* Minimum under-bust measurement in cm */,
  "under_bust_max" INTEGER /* Maximum under-bust measurement in cm */,
  "bust_min" INTEGER /* Minimum bust measurement in cm */,
  "bust_max" INTEGER /* Maximum bust measurement in cm */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* A human-readable name for the size (e.g., '65B') */,
  "size_status" TEXT /* Status of the size (e.g., 'active', 'discontinued') */,
  "size_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or details about the size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colors" (
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color */,
  "color_name" TEXT /* Name of the color */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Hex code of the color */,
  "color_status" TEXT /* Status of the color (e.g., 'active', 'discontinued') */,
  "color_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or details about the color */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "product_status" TEXT /* Status of the product (e.g., 'active', 'discontinued') */,
  "product_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or details about the product */,
  "product_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "product_language" TEXT /* Language of the product description */,
  "product_currency" TEXT /* Currency of the product price */,
  "product_weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the product in grams */,
  "product_dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product (e.g., '10x10x2 cm') */,
  "product_material" TEXT /* Material composition of the product */,
  "product_care_instructions" TEXT /* Care instructions for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "brand_website" TEXT /* URL to the brand's website */,
  "brand_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the brand's logo */,
  "brand_founded_date" TEXT /* Date when the brand was founded */,
  "brand_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or details about the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_status" TEXT /* Status of the category (e.g., 'active', 'discontinued') */,
  "category_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or details about the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "supplier_status" TEXT /* Status of the supplier (e.g., 'active', 'inactive') */,
  "supplier_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or details about the supplier */,
  "supplier_website" TEXT /* URL to the supplier's website */,
  "supplier_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the supplier's logo */,
  "supplier_performance_rating" REAL /* Performance rating of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "color_id" INTEGER /* ID of the color */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last updated */,
  "reorder_threshold" INTEGER /* Quantity at which the product should be reordered */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when stock is low */,
  "last_reorder_date" TEXT /* Date when the last reorder was placed */,
  "inventory_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or details about the inventory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the store */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the store is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the store is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the store */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the store is located */,
  "store_status" TEXT /* Status of the store (e.g., 'active', 'inactive') */,
  "store_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or details about the store */,
  "store_opening_date" TEXT /* Date when the store opened */,
  "store_manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the store manager */,
  "store_manager_email" TEXT /* Email of the store manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product sold */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size sold */,
  "color_id" INTEGER /* ID of the color sold */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the sale occurred */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "sale_status" TEXT /* Status of the sale (e.g., 'pending', 'completed') */,
  "sale_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or details about the sale */,
  "sale_currency" TEXT /* Currency of the sale */,
  "sale_tax" REAL /* Tax amount for the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the customer is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the customer is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the customer is located */,
  "preferred_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer's preferred bra size */,
  "preferred_color_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer's preferred bra color */,
  "customer_status" TEXT /* Status of the customer (e.g., 'active', 'inactive') */,
  "customer_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or details about the customer */,
  "customer_language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the customer */,
  "customer_currency" TEXT /* Preferred currency of the customer */,
  "customer_anniversary_date" TEXT /* Anniversary date for the customer (e.g., for loyalty programs) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_preferred_color_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_color_id") REFERENCES colors ("color_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_preferred_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_size_id") REFERENCES bra_sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale being returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the return was made */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the returned product (e.g., 'new', 'used') */,
  "approved" INTEGER /* Whether the return has been approved */,
  "refunded" INTEGER /* Whether the refund has been processed */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Status of the return (e.g., 'pending', 'approved', 'rejected') */,
  "return_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or details about the return */,
  "return_currency" TEXT /* Currency of the return */,
  "return_tax" REAL /* Tax amount for the return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment written by the customer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., 'approved', 'pending', 'rejected') */,
  "review_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or details about the review */,
  "review_language" TEXT /* Language of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store placing the order */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier fulfilling the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., 'pending', 'shipped', 'delivered') */,
  "order_currency" TEXT /* Currency of the order */,
  "order_tax" REAL /* Tax amount for the order */,
  "order_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or details about the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "color_id" INTEGER /* ID of the color */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Price per unit of the product */,
  "order_item_status" TEXT /* Status of the order item (e.g., 'pending', 'shipped', 'delivered') */,
  "order_item_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or details about the order item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id")
)
